message:
Pre-deploy polish: OG card image, sitemap.xml, robots.txt

- og-image.svg (1200x630): dark card with the brand split + tagline +
  three big "5× / 2.4× / 3.8×" green numbers + an orange "...and 2.1×
  larger bundle than capnweb" line so the share preview leads with the
  honest framing instead of pure marketing.
- og:* + twitter:card meta on all 5 pages, each with page-specific
  title/description (landing, playground, rpc, honest, inspect).
- sitemap.xml lists all five pages, robots.txt allows everything and
  points at the sitemap. Both ready for whatever host the site lands on.

Verified end-to-end via vite preview: /og-image.svg, /sitemap.xml,
/robots.txt all serve 200 OK and every page has the og:image meta.

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,14 @@
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
   <title>capnwasm — honest comparison</title>
   <meta name="description" content="Where capnwasm wins, where it loses, where it's tied. With reproducible numbers, no marketing handwave." />
+  <meta property="og:title" content="capnwasm — honest comparison" />
+  <meta property="og:description" content="Wins, losses, ties vs capnweb and REST/JSON. Bundle + cold start go to capnweb." />
+  <meta property="og:image" content="/og-image.svg" />
+  <meta property="og:type" content="article" />
+  <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
+  <meta name="twitter:title" content="capnwasm — honest comparison" />
+  <meta name="twitter:description" content="Wins, losses, ties." />
+  <meta name="twitter:image" content="/og-image.svg" />
   <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
   <link rel="stylesheet" href="./src/honest/style.css" />
 </head>

@@ -6,7 +6,13 @@
   <title>capnwasm — Cap'n Proto for the browser</title>
   <meta name="description" content="Real Cap'n Proto C++ compiled to wasm. Type-safe binary RPC for the browser, faster than capnweb on every workload that matters." />
   <meta property="og:title" content="capnwasm — Cap'n Proto for the browser" />
-  <meta property="og:description" content="Type-safe binary RPC, real Cap'n Proto wasm runtime. 3.2x faster than capnweb on burst throughput, 3.8x faster on big payloads." />
+  <meta property="og:description" content="Type-safe binary RPC, real Cap'n Proto wasm runtime. ~5x faster than capnweb on burst throughput, 3.8x faster on big payloads. 44 KB gzip." />
+  <meta property="og:image" content="/og-image.svg" />
+  <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
+  <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
+  <meta name="twitter:title" content="capnwasm — Cap'n Proto for the browser" />
+  <meta name="twitter:description" content="Real Cap'n Proto C++ in the browser. Live RPC bench in the playground." />
+  <meta name="twitter:image" content="/og-image.svg" />
   <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
   <link rel="stylesheet" href="./src/landing/style.css" />
 </head>

@@ -3,7 +3,16 @@
 <head>
   <meta charset="UTF-8" />
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
-  <title>capnwasm playground — live REST vs capnwasm bench</title>
+  <title>capnwasm playground — live REST vs capnweb vs capnwasm bench</title>

 </head>

@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 630" width="1200" height="630">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#0a0a0a"/>
+      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0d1418"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <rect width="1200" height="630" fill="url(#bg)"/>
+  <rect x="40" y="40" width="1120" height="550" rx="20" fill="none" stroke="#1a2832" stroke-width="2"/>
+
+  <!-- Brand mark -->
+  <text x="80" y="140" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
+        font-weight="700" font-size="72" fill="#e0e0e0">capn<tspan fill="#4fc3f7" font-weight="400">wasm</tspan></text>
+
+  <!-- Tagline -->
+  <text x="80" y="200" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
+        font-size="28" fill="#888">Real Cap'n Proto C++ in the browser. 44 KB gzip.</text>
+
+  <!-- Three big numbers -->
+  <g font-family="ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace" font-weight="700">
+    <g>
+      <text x="80"  y="340" font-size="100" fill="#66bb6a">5×</text>
+      <text x="80"  y="395" font-size="22"  fill="#bbb">faster</text>
+      <text x="80"  y="425" font-size="22"  fill="#888">RPC burst</text>
+    </g>
+    <g>
+      <text x="430" y="340" font-size="100" fill="#66bb6a">2.4×</text>
+      <text x="430" y="395" font-size="22"  fill="#bbb">smaller</text>
+      <text x="430" y="425" font-size="22"  fill="#888">wire bytes (gz)</text>
+    </g>
+    <g>
+      <text x="820" y="340" font-size="100" fill="#66bb6a">3.8×</text>
+      <text x="820" y="395" font-size="22"  fill="#bbb">faster</text>
+      <text x="820" y="425" font-size="22"  fill="#888">64 KB echo</text>
+    </g>
+  </g>
+
+  <!-- Honest about the loss -->
+  <text x="80" y="500" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
+        font-size="22" fill="#ffa726">…and 2.1× larger bundle than capnweb (we say so on the site).</text>
+
+  <!-- Footer -->
+  <text x="80" y="555" font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
+        font-size="20" fill="#666">vs capnweb & REST/JSON · live in-browser bench at the link</text>
+</svg>

@@ -4,6 +4,15 @@

   <title>capnwasm — live RPC bench (capnwasm vs capnweb)</title>

+  <meta property="og:title" content="capnwasm — live RPC bench" />

+  <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
+  <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
+  <meta name="twitter:title" content="capnwasm — live RPC bench" />
+  <meta name="twitter:description" content="capnwasm vs capnweb, three RPC workloads." />
+  <meta name="twitter:image" content="/og-image.svg" />
   <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
   <link rel="stylesheet" href="./src/playground/style.css" />
   <link rel="stylesheet" href="./src/rpc/style.css" />
